en: A MASKIL OF ASAPH.O God, why do you cast us off forever? Why does your anger smoke against the sheep of your pasture?
zh: 神啊！你為甚麼永遠丟棄我們呢？ 為甚麼你的怒氣向你草場上的羊群好像煙冒出呢？

en: Remember your congregation, which you have purchased of old, which you have redeemed to be the tribe of your heritage! Remember Mount Zion, where you have dwelt.
zh: 求你記念你在古時買贖的會眾， 就是你贖回作你產業的民族； 求你記念你所居住的錫安山。

en: Direct your steps to the perpetual ruins; the enemy has destroyed everything in the sanctuary!
zh: 求你舉步去看那些長久荒涼的地方， 去看仇敵在聖所裡所行的一切惡事。

en: Your foes have roared in the midst of your meeting place; they set up their own signs for signs.
zh: 你的敵人在敬拜你的聚會中吼叫， 他們豎起了自己的旗幟為記號。

en: They were like those who swing axes in a forest of trees.
zh: 他們好像那些舉起斧子， 在樹林中砍伐樹木的人。

en: And all its carved wood they broke down with hatchets and hammers.
zh: 聖殿中的一切雕刻， 他們都用斧子和銃子打碎了。

en: They set your sanctuary on fire; they profaned the dwelling place of your name, bringing it down to the ground.
zh: 他們用火把你的聖所燒成焦土， 他們褻瀆你名的居所。

en: They said to themselves, "We will utterly subdue them"; they burned all the meeting places of God in the land.
zh: 他們心裡說：“我們要把它們完全毀滅！” 他們燒毀了地上一切敬拜 神的聚會地方。

en: We do not see our signs; there is no longer any prophet, and there is none among us who knows how long.
zh: 我們看不見我們的記號， 也不再有先知； 我們中間也沒有人知道這災禍要到幾時。

en: How long, O God, is the foe to scoff? Is the enemy to revile your name forever?
zh: 神啊！敵人辱罵你要到幾時呢？ 仇敵褻慢你的名要到永遠嗎？

en: Why do you hold back your hand, your right hand? Take it from the fold of your garment and destroy them!
zh: 你為甚麼把你的手，就是你的右手收回呢？ 求你從懷中抽出來毀滅他們。

en: Yet God my King is from of old, working salvation in the midst of the earth.
zh: 神自古以來就是我的君王， 在地上施行拯救。

en: You divided the sea by your might; you broke the heads of the sea monsters on the waters.
zh: 你曾用你的大能分開大海， 把海中怪獸的頭都打碎了。

en: You crushed the heads of Leviathan; you gave him as food for the creatures of the wilderness.
zh: 你砸碎了利未亞坦 的頭， 把牠給住在曠野的人作食物。

en: You split open springs and brooks; you dried up ever-flowing streams.
zh: 你曾開闢泉源和溪流， 又使長流不息的江河乾涸。

en: Yours is the day, yours also the night; you have established the heavenly lights and the sun.
zh: 白晝是你的，黑夜也是你的， 月亮和太陽，都是你設立的。

en: You have fixed all the boundaries of the earth; you have made summer and winter.
zh: 地上的一切疆界都是你立定的， 夏天和冬天都是你制定的。

en: Remember this, O LORD, how the enemy scoffs, and a foolish people reviles your name.
zh: 耶和華啊！仇敵辱罵你， 愚頑人褻瀆你的名， 求你記念這事。

en: Do not deliver the soul of your dove to the wild beasts; do not forget the life of your poor forever.
zh: 求你不要把你斑鳩的性命交給野獸， 不要永遠忘記你困苦人的性命。

en: Have regard for the covenant, for the dark places of the land are full of the habitations of violence.
zh: 求你顧念所立的約， 因為地上黑暗的地方充滿了強暴的居所。

en: Let not the downtrodden turn back in shame; let the poor and needy praise your name.
zh: 不要使受欺壓的人蒙羞回去， 要使困苦、貧窮的人讚美你的名。

en: Arise, O God, defend your cause; remember how the foolish scoff at you all the day!
zh: 神啊！求你起來，為你的案件辯護， 要記得愚頑人終日對你的辱罵。

en: Do not forget the clamor of your foes, the uproar of those who rise against you, which goes up continually!
zh: 求你不要忘記你敵人的聲音， 不要忘記那些起來與你為敵的人不住加劇地喧鬧。
